---
name: Bug report
about: Report a reproducible problem to help us improve
title: "[Bug]: "
labels: bug
assignees: ""
---

## Summary

A clear and concise description of the bug.

## Steps To Reproduce

1. Go to ...
2. Call / do ...
3. See error ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened.

## Version

- Version where bug was found (required):
- First known good version (optional):

## Environment

- OS:
- Runtime / SDK version:
- Docker image tag (if applicable):

## Logs Or Screenshots

Add relevant logs, stack traces, or screenshots.

## Additional Context

Any extra details that can help diagnose quickly.

## Be Kind

Please keep communication respectful and constructive. Focus feedback on behavior and technical details, not people.
